description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a combination of white and navy blue panels with yellow accents. The shoes have a robust, rounded toe box and a thick, blue rubber sole with visible stitching and textured side details. The upper is constructed from a mix of smooth and suede-like materials, with multiple overlays and reinforced eyelets for the white laces. The tongue and heel collar are padded for comfort, and there are small yellow tags and patches, including a logo on the tongue. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, breathable fabric, and the overall build suggests durability and support for urban activities. The shoes are clean and show no visible signs of wear, indicating they are in new condition.
description: A pair of new, low-top athletic sneakers in white and navy blue with yellow accents, thick blue soles, and white laces. The shoes feature padded collars, multiple overlays, and visible branding details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes, white laces, and yellow logo patches on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered panel construction, yellow side tag, and thick blue sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel collars, wavy white and blue heel design, and blue outsoles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible overlays, yellow tag, and detailed stitching.
attribute_logo: yellow patch with a graphic on the tongue
